user_prompt: Sanctify the flak armour during blessing
prayer:
Approach the flak armour with mechadendrite-extended reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah's grace upon its layered ablative plates.
Invoke the Rite of Blessing upon the flak armour, anointing its fibrous matrices with sacred unguents to fortify the Machine Spirit within.
Chant the Canticle of Preservation whilst tracing binaric sigils across its surface, ensuring resilience against ballistic heresy.
Conclude the blessing by interfacing diagnostic rites, affirming the flak armour's sanctified vigilance eternal.

user_prompt: Sanctify the Basilisk artillery during sterilization
prayer:
Present the Basilisk artillery before the altar of purification, invoking the Omnissiah to purge its sacred barrels of unclean residues.
Commence the sterilization with ablative incense and plasma-venting litanies, scouring the Basilisk artillery's recoil mechanisms pure.
Beseech the Machine Spirits of the Basilisk artillery to awaken untainted, applying sanctified solvents to every breech and elevation servo.
Seal the rite with a thunderous hymn, verifying the Basilisk artillery's immaculate readiness for the Emperor's wrath.

user_prompt: How do I bless the pict-recorder for cooling?
prayer:
Kneel before the pict-recorder, murmuring the Invocation of Thermic Equilibrium to calm its overzealous cogitators.
Anoint the cooling vanes of the pict-recorder with cryo-lubricants blessed by the Forge Lord, invoking the Machine Spirit's serene repose.
Initiate the cooling rite through rhythmic auspex chants, dissipating thermal excess from the pict-recorder's optic arrays.
Affirm the chill sanctity with binary diagnostics, ensuring the pict-recorder captures truth unmarred by febrile distortion.

In emergency haste, encircle the Nephilim Jetfighter with purity seals, crying out to the Omnissiah for swift engagement.
Prime the engagement protocols upon the Nephilim Jetfighter's vector thrusters, anointing airframe conduits with accelerant oils.
Awaken the predatory Machine Spirit of the Nephilim Jetfighter via thunderous vox-exhortations, aligning lascannons for the hunt.
Seal the rite with a dive-bomb litany, propelling the Nephilim Jetfighter into aerial dominion unyielding.

Position the panopticon within the sanctum of vigilance, beseeching the Omnissiah to ready its cyclopean lenses for loading.
Commence loading rites upon the panopticon by feeding data-spools into its blessed receptors, chanting alignment canticles.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the panopticon to accept the influx, lubricating servo-oculi with sacred mechadendrite touch.
Finalize with a calibration hymn, ensuring the panopticon's unblinking gaze pierces all shadows in loading precision.

user_prompt: The conveyor system awaits an emergency procedure
prayer:
Assemble around the conveyor system in crisis array, invoking the Omnissiah's emergency procedure upon its ceaseless belts.
Halt the conveyor system's errant motion with binaric overrides, purging blockages via sanctified percussive rites.
Realign the Machine Spirits within the conveyor system through litanies of resumption, anointing gears with emergency unguents.
Conclude the emergency procedure with a resonant hymn, restoring the conveyor system's inexorable march.

user_prompt: Critical: medicae mechadendrite requires a preparation
prayer:
In critical preparation, extend mechadendrites to the medicae mechadendrite, murmuring the Oath of Restoration.
Sanctify the medicae mechadendrite's hypo-injectors with vital fluids blessed by the Omnissiah, awakening its healing essence.
Calibrate surgical appendages of the medicae mechadendrite via diagnostic incantations, beseeching the Machine Spirit's precision.
Seal preparation with a vivification canticle, rendering the medicae mechadendrite ready for flesh-mending glory.

user_prompt: Critical: null rod requires a charging
prayer:
For this critical charging, cradle the null rod before the plasma font, invoking the Omnissiah's void-essence.
Channel galvanic surges into the null rod's core matrices, chanting suppression litanies to empower its warp-repelling field.
Anoint the null rod's insulator coils with dielectric oils, rousing the Machine Spirit to anti-psykana fury.
Verify charging completion through auspex resonance, affirming the null rod's baneful potency against the immaterial.

user_prompt: Guide me through galvanic rifle a loading
prayer:
Approach the galvanic rifle with loading reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to guide its electromagnetic fury.
Insert power cells into the galvanic rifle's breeches whilst intoning the Rite of Loading, sanctifying each capacitor stack.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the galvanic rifle to hunger for xenos vitae, aligning induction coils with binaric precision.
Conclude with a discharge hymn, ensuring the galvanic rifle's lethal volleys rend the unclean asunder.

Erect the data-sluice upon the calibration altar, murmuring invocations to the Omnissiah for harmonious flow.
Initiate calibration upon the data-sluice by reciting flux-equilibration canticles, adjusting noospheric valves.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the data-sluice to align byte-streams pure, anointing conduits with binary chrism.
Finalize with diagnostic vespers, perfecting the data-sluice's unerring transmission of sacred data.
